summary: The Gradle project health check task ':platform-base:projectHealth' failed, causing the build to fail; the logs shown do not include the underlying error message.

evidence.reason: Directly shows which Gradle task failed.
Confirms the task execution failure reported by Gradle.
Indicates the overall build failed and stopped.

evidence.quote: (node:2093) [DEP0005] DeprecationWarning: Buffer() is deprecated due to security and usability issues. Please use the Buffer.alloc(), Buffer.allocUnsafe(), or Buffer.from() methods instead.
evidence.reason: Shows a Node.js deprecation warning present in the logs, but it does not indicate the cause of the Gradle task failure.

evidence.quote: warning: The code being documented uses packages in the unnamed module, but the packages defined in https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/ are in named modules.
evidence.reason: Shows a Javadoc/module warning present in the logs, but it does not show the error that caused the task to fail.

suggested_fix: Re-run the failing Gradle task with diagnostic flags to capture the underlying error, for example: ./gradlew :platform-base:projectHealth --stacktrace --info (or --debug) and inspect the full logs to identify and fix the root cause.
